_comment: Explicit parent/child or rebrand merges that Phase 9 Step 2 (Jaro-Winkler) misses because the names diverge too much (e.g. 'Foo Therapeutics' vs 'Foo Technologies'). Each entry: list of names to collapse into one cluster within the given MSA. Names are matched case-insensitively after Phase 9's _norm() (lowercase, strip punctuation + legal suffixes). The first listed name's row is kept as canonical; source flags are OR'd, counts/dollars summed.

merges.reason: same Doylestown PA entity; rebrand from FlowMetric -> Flowmetric Life Sciences
same Bedford TX address; therapeutics is a known spinout of the technologies parent
Columbia MD; HoldCo (Management) and OpCo (Health MD) of the same group
same founders / Wilmington-Philadelphia rebrand; sequential SEC CIKs
